prompt.description: Text prompt describing what to generate or edit. Supports Chinese and English, up to 5000 characters. For editing, provide reference images.
prompt.title: Prompt

reference_images.description: Reference images for editing (0-9 images). Order in array defines image order.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

num_images.description: Number of images to generate (1-4). When image set mode is enabled, max is 12.
num_images.title: Num Images

size.description: Output resolution: '1K' (1024x1024), '2K' (2048x2048, default). Or specify pixel dimensions like '1024*768'.
size.title: Size

watermark.description: Add 'AI Generated' watermark to bottom-right corner.
watermark.title: Watermark

thinking_mode.description: Enable thinking mode for better quality. Only effective for text-to-image without image input or image set mode.
thinking_mode.title: Thinking Mode

enable_sequential.description: Enable image set output mode for generating consistent multi-image sets (e.g., same character in different scenes).
enable_sequential.title: Enable Sequential

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility (0-2147483647). Same seed yields similar outputs.
seed.title: Seed
